messages.name: Excel Automation Solutions
messages.inferred_need_1: PLC/SCADA connectivity and industrial protocol conversion
messages.inferred_need_2: system integration and industrial device networking
messages.source_description: We offer real-time hands-on practical training with major brands of PLC SCADA DCS that are widely used globally.
messages.message: Hope you are having a wonderful day. Hello, this is Kali from BLIIOT. Our company focuses on industrial IoT connectivity products, especially gateways, edge controllers, and field data acquisition devices used in automation systems. It looks like your projects involve PLC/SCADA connectivity and industrial protocol conversion / system integration and industrial device networking. Our BA building automation gateways together with industrial gateways and routers are often used in PLC, SCADA, and industrial communication projects. They are suitable for projects that need protocol conversion, remote access, and reliable field data collection. If you have a current requirement, I would be glad to suggest matching models for your application. If helpful, you can first review our website here: https://bliiot.com/ Let me know if you would like a quick catalog.

messages.name: Neel Smartec Co
messages.inferred_need_1: energy monitoring and utility equipment communication
messages.inferred_need_2: IIoT edge integration and remote monitoring
messages.source_description: Independent PLM and IIoT consulting for manufacturers — strategy, roadmap, and Industry 5.0 adoption. Vendor-agnostic. Award-winning author. India & internationally.
messages.message: Hope you are enjoying a good day. Hi, Kali here from BLIIOT. We are an industrial IoT hardware supplier with products for gateways, routers, and remote acquisition in monitoring and utility scenarios. It seems your projects are related to energy monitoring and utility equipment communication / IIoT edge integration and remote monitoring. For these applications, we usually recommend industrial gateways and routers together with ARM edge controllers for energy monitoring, remote utility access, and industrial data transmission. They are designed for practical deployment in utility monitoring, industrial telemetry, and remote access scenarios. If you are evaluating a remote monitoring project, I can recommend suitable products and share pricing information. For a quick overview of our company and products, here is our website: https://bliiot.com/ Would you like me to send a quick catalog?
